title: Implement Go API foundation
goal: Build the base Go REST API with routing, config, database connection, logging, healthcheck, and security middleware.
scope: Add request logging, recovery, CORS, body limits, and rate-limit foundation.
Add public project and profile endpoints.
notes: Added chi-based routing with request IDs, real IP handling, panic recovery, request logging, CORS, security headers, request body limits, and IP-based rate limiting.
Added API config for database URL, allowed origins, body limit, and server timeout settings.
Added a pgxpool PostgreSQL connection helper with conservative connection limits for the low-cost deployment target.
Added structured profile and project repository contracts with a static fallback that matches the seeded database content.
Installed local Go 1.26.2 into .tools/go and ran gofmt on apps/api and apps/mcp.
